entries.claim: svc_scaled_C=2.0_kernel=rbf is robustly better than random_forest_n=300.
entries.blocked_reason: Measured top-model effect is not larger than inter-seed noise. The report must not claim a robust best model.
entries.allowed_rewrite: svc_scaled_C=2.0_kernel=rbf had the best multi-seed mean accuracy, but the effect was smaller than seed noise; no robust best-model claim is allowed.

entries.claim: C=2.0 is robustly better than C=0.5.
entries.blocked_reason: Measured effect is not larger than inter-seed noise. The report must not oversell this as a robust discovery.
entries.allowed_rewrite: C=2.0 had the best mean accuracy, but the effect was smaller than seed noise.
